label: Zero Trust / SASE Specialist
description: Designs and implements Zero Trust network access, SASE frameworks, and cloud-delivered network security including ZTNA, SWG, CASB, and FWaaS.

paths.name: Vendor-Neutral Zero Trust Track
paths.rationale: CSA CCZT is the only recognized vendor-neutral Zero Trust certification — applicable across all ZTNA and SASE implementations.
pros: CCZT is vendor-neutral — applicable across all ZTNA and SASE platforms
CSA credentials recognized across cloud and network security
Strong architectural foundation before vendor specialization
cons: Zero Trust certification market still developing

prerequisites.experience: Network security or cloud security engineering experience beneficial.

cert_sequence.notes: CSA cloud security foundation — establishes the cloud security context that ZTNA and SASE implementations operate within.

CSA Certificate of Competence in Zero Trust — the only vendor-neutral Zero Trust credential. Covers Zero Trust principles, ZTNA design patterns, SDP architecture, and implementation methodology. Open-book using CSA guidance documents.
ISC2 CCSP adds the senior cloud security architecture credential that contextualizes Zero Trust within broader cloud security strategy. Opens architect-level roles.

paths.name: Zscaler (SASE) Track
paths.rationale: Zscaler is the dominant SASE platform. ZDTA and ZDTE are required by name in Zscaler deployment and administration roles.
pros: Zscaler is the leading SASE platform — high demand for certified engineers
Strong salary premium for Zscaler specialists
cons: Platform-specific — skills less transferable to Netskope or Palo Alto SASE

cert_sequence.notes: Vendor-neutral Zero Trust foundation before platform specialization.
Zscaler Zero Trust Tenet Associate — foundational ZIA and ZPA administration. Required before ZDTE. Zscaler provides free training through their learning portal.

Zscaler Zero Trust Tenet Expert — advanced ZIA/ZPA configuration, troubleshooting, and enterprise deployment design. Primary Zscaler engineering credential required at most Zscaler-deployed organizations.
